title:
Attend the 2025-26 Thailand
Premier Ball League and get a Medal!
description:
2025-26 Thailand Premier Ball League attendees will be gifted a special medal to commemorate their visit! 

■ Date & Place:
October 4-5, 2025 at Central Westgate

■ How to receive the Medal
1. Attend the 2025-26 Thailand Premier Ball League
2. Look for the dedicated panel inside the event venue.
3. In the Pokémon HOME smartphone app, choose Medals → Scan → NFC Scan.
4. Touch the dedicated panel to issue your medal!
 
■Important notes
• Receiving commemorative medals at the venue can only be done once per day.
• When receiving your medal, you will be able to get two copies of the same medal at once.
• The daily limitation will be reset every day at midnight (UTC).
• Feel free to ask staff at the venue for more details.
• This service may be suspended without notice due to unavoidable circumstances.
• Admission limits may be set at the venue to prevent overcrowding.
• During Pokémon HOME maintenance periods, the Medals feature becomes unavailable as well.
• Please note that we are not able to deal with requests related to a maintenance period preventing attendees from receiving medals.
• Please also note that some attendees may be unable to properly receive medals due to the settings or condition of their smartphone, and that we will not be able to offer assistance in such cases.
